ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-21-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-20-2017 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (20-22 Belcher St, San Francisco, Ca, 94114)
Off Calendar Apr-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $1,980,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the amended report of sale filed March 21, 2017 . The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (20-22 Belcher St, San Francisco, Ca, 94114)
Off Calendar Apr-03-2017 Off Calendar

Petition For Termination Of Trust; For Determination Of Trust Distribution Rights And For Judgment Quieting Title To Real Property; Or In The Alternative, Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee; And Request For Judicial Notice [Prob. Code 850, 15408, 17200(B)(13)]
Off Calendar Jan-17-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court granted the Petition for Termination of Trust, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Chien. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

The Court stated that this is a petition for the Public Administrator to be appointed, confirmed that there have been no objections and that no heirs have stepped forward. Mr. Weinkauf stated that this is a peculiar situation and that they were found at the same time. The Court stated that without any other facts it understands the presumption and that the only heirs with standing to challenge would be the siblings who are not present. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration with will annexed in open court, stating that the probate referee will be Isidoor Bornstein and that no bond will be required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
